com.onlinepayments.domain

Class DetokenizedTokenResponse

  • java.lang.Object
    • com.onlinepayments.domain.DetokenizedTokenResponse

  • public class DetokenizedTokenResponse
extends Object

    • Constructor Summary

      Constructors 
      Constructor and Description
      DetokenizedTokenResponse() 

    • Method Summary

      All Methods Instance Methods Concrete Methods 
      Modifier and Type Method and Description
      String getCardBrand()
      The brand of the card (e.g., VISA, MasterCard).
      String getCardExpiryDate()
      The expiration date of the card in MMYY format, where MM represents the two-digit month and YY represents the two-digit year.
      String getCardHolderName()
      The full name of the cardholder as it appears on the card.
      String getEncryptedCardNumber()
      The card number, encrypted and Base64 encoded for secure transport.
      String getPaymentId()
      The unique identifier for the payment associated with the token is necessary for tracking.
      String getSchemeReferenceData()
      Reference data associated with the payment scheme for the credentials on file.
      String getToken()
      The unique identifier for the token is required for processing.
      void setCardBrand(String value)
      The brand of the card (e.g., VISA, MasterCard).
      void setCardExpiryDate(String value)
      The expiration date of the card in MMYY format, where MM represents the two-digit month and YY represents the two-digit year.
      void setCardHolderName(String value)
      The full name of the cardholder as it appears on the card.
      void setEncryptedCardNumber(String value)
      The card number, encrypted and Base64 encoded for secure transport.
      void setPaymentId(String value)
      The unique identifier for the payment associated with the token is necessary for tracking.
      void setSchemeReferenceData(String value)
      Reference data associated with the payment scheme for the credentials on file.
      void setToken(String value)
      The unique identifier for the token is required for processing.

      The brand of the card (e.g., VISA, MasterCard).

      The expiration date of the card in MMYY format, where MM represents the two-digit month and YY represents the two-digit year.

      The full name of the cardholder as it appears on the card.

      The card number, encrypted and Base64 encoded for secure transport.

      The unique identifier for the payment associated with the token is necessary for tracking.
      DetokenizedTokenResponse withSchemeReferenceData(String value)
      Reference data associated with the payment scheme for the credentials on file.
      DetokenizedTokenResponse withToken(String value)
      The unique identifier for the token is required for processing.

    • Method Detail

      • getCardBrand

        public String getCardBrand()
        The brand of the card (e.g., VISA, MasterCard).

      • setCardBrand

        public void setCardBrand(String value)
        The brand of the card (e.g., VISA, MasterCard).

      • withCardBrand

        public DetokenizedTokenResponse withCardBrand(String value)
        The brand of the card (e.g., VISA, MasterCard).

      • getCardExpiryDate

        public String getCardExpiryDate()
        The expiration date of the card in MMYY format, where MM represents the two-digit month and YY represents the two-digit year. For example, a value of 0529 indicates that the card expires in May 2029.

      • setCardExpiryDate

        public void setCardExpiryDate(String value)
        The expiration date of the card in MMYY format, where MM represents the two-digit month and YY represents the two-digit year. For example, a value of 0529 indicates that the card expires in May 2029.

      • withCardExpiryDate

        public DetokenizedTokenResponse withCardExpiryDate(String value)
        The expiration date of the card in MMYY format, where MM represents the two-digit month and YY represents the two-digit year. For example, a value of 0529 indicates that the card expires in May 2029.

      • getCardHolderName

        public String getCardHolderName()
        The full name of the cardholder as it appears on the card.

      • setCardHolderName

        public void setCardHolderName(String value)
        The full name of the cardholder as it appears on the card.

        The full name of the cardholder as it appears on the card.
